sys_ui_action.comments: Last Update on 2.5.8 As a Task Owner or Task manager of the Primary Office (OUTA), I will click the "Send Clarification" UI on tasks that are on the following states so that I can provide clarification regarding any task fields of the task form. I will be required to add clarification comments in the "Additional Comments" field of the task form.
sys_ui_action.name: Send Clarification
